title: NVDA guidance debate heats up
content_text: Retail traders are debating whether AI capex is still accelerating. Mentions of inference demand, hyperscaler budgets, and semiconductor supply constraints increased today.
author: poster-a

title: Browser automation startups keep appearing
content_text: Several users discussed small teams building browser agents for ticketing, back-office workflows, and lead research. Sentiment is excited but skeptical about reliability.
author: poster-b

title: Rate cut expectations and small caps
content_text: Hot posts mentioned small-cap rallies, rate cut timing, and risk appetite. Keyword overlap with AI infrastructure remains lower than yesterday.
author: poster-c
